login.sign_in_to_continue: Kota na compte na yo mpo okoba

hero_section.platform_description: Bokamba ba niveaux nyonso ya mateya na plateforme moko ya mikolo oyo. Kobanda na primaire kino na université, moto nyonso azali na esika na ye.
hero_section.trusted_by: Ba eteyelo koleka 150 batieli biso motema
hero_section.security_description: Ba données ebatelami mpe confidentialité etosami.
hero_section.communication_description: Ba échanges ya mbangu kati na bato nyonso.
hero_section.everything_to_succeed: Nyonso mpo na kolonga mobu ya kelasi
hero_section.real_time_grades: Kolanda ba notes na tango ya solo
hero_section.real_time_grades_description: Mona progrès mpe ba performances mbala moko.
hero_section.interactive_schedule_description: Programɛ ya moto na moto mpe ba notifications automatiques.
hero_section.permanent_access_description: Esalaka na ordinateur, tablette mpe téléphone.

users.everyone_finds_place: Moto nyonso azwi esika na ye.
users.students_description: Accès na mateya, ba notes mpe programɛ na tango ya solo.
users.teachers_description: Bokambi ya ba classes, publication ya ba notes mpe suivi pédagogique.
users.parents_description: Kolanda progrès ya mwana mpe kosolola na eteyelo.
users.administration_description: Tableau de bord ya bokambi ya malamu.

dashboard.title: Bokamba eteyelo na yo na ndenge ya malamu
dashboard.description: Système ya bokambi ya kelasi oyo esalisaka administration, ematisaka mateya mpe epesaka nzela ya kosolola malamu.

showcase.modern_dashboard: Tableau de bord ya mikolo oyo
showcase.modern_dashboard_description: Interface ya pete mpo na kozwa accès na misala nyonso noki.
showcase.mobile_friendly_description: Kota na ba données ya eteyelo na yo bisika nyonso mpe na appareil nyonso.
showcase.secure_reliable_description: Bokengi ya niveau ya entreprise mpo na kobatela ba données sensibles.
showcase.designed_for_modern_education: Esalemi mpo na mateya ya mikolo oyo
showcase.designed_description: Plateforme na biso ekoki kosalelama na maternelle, primaire, collège, lycée mpe université. Eteyelo nyonso ekoki kozwa modèle oyo ebongi na yango.
showcase.ready_to_transform: Ozali prêt mpo na kobongola eteyelo na yo?
showcase.ready_description: Sangana na ba eteyelo koleka 150 oyo bazali kotiela SchoolHub motema mpo na kobongisa bokambi mpe expérience éducative.
